name: Bank of America Corp.
h1: BofA, BoA's GCC footprint in India
lede: BofA, BoA runs six capability centers across six Indian cities. Gurugram, Hyderabad, Gandhinagar, New Delhi, Chennai and Mumbai, covering gbs, built over 22 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one BofA, BoA office in India. We map six, across six cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Bank of America Corp. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports

faq.q: How many GCC centers does BofA, BoA operate in India?
faq.a: BofA, BoA operates 6 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.a: BofA, BoA's India GCC footprint spans Gurugram, Hyderabad, Gandhinagar, New Delhi, Chennai and Mumbai.

faq.a: BofA, BoA runs gbs centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at BofA, BoA's India GCCs?
faq.a: BofA, BoA's India centers employ in the >10K range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads BofA, BoA's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 310 leaders at BofA, BoA's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.
